$schema: HIRECAR Self-Improving Agent Feedback Loop — HC-WPK-004-A
description: Monitors automation performance and generates optimization recommendations

optimization_rules.analysis: Identify endpoints consuming most CPU. Look for: redundant database queries, inefficient loops, unnecessary API calls, N+1 problems.
Analyze failure patterns: which endpoint fails most? Is it transient (retry) or systematic (config)? Time-of-day correlation? Check Worker logs.
optimization_rules.action: Generate failure analysis report with specific fix recommendations

optimization_rules.analysis: Check domain authentication, content quality, send frequency, subject line performance.
Evaluate if Cloudflare Worker scaling is needed. Project growth trend. Consider Worker optimization vs. upgrading.
optimization_rules.action: Generate scaling recommendation with cost-benefit analysis

entries.observation: Initial deployment — all systems in setup phase
entries.learning: Baseline established. No performance data yet.
entries.action: Monitor first 48 hours closely for configuration issues.
